content.tagline: South Florida's Trusted Marine Survey Experts
content.about:
Global Yacht & Ship Surveyors is a Miami-based marine surveying firm with nearly three decades of experience evaluating and inspecting vessels of all types across South Florida. Founded in 1998 and led by Robert R. Garay, an Accredited Marine Surveyor (AMS®) credentialed through the Society of Accredited Marine Surveyors (SAMS), the firm has built a solid reputation throughout Miami-Dade County and the surrounding region as a reliable, experienced choice for professional boat surveys.

Whether you're purchasing a pre-owned vessel or renewing your marine insurance policy, the quality of your survey matters. Global Yacht & Ship Surveyors provides thorough boat inspections and marine surveys covering hull integrity, mechanical systems, safety equipment, and overall vessel condition. Robert Garay's AMS® credential reflects a commitment to professional standards and ongoing education in the field of marine surveying — giving buyers, sellers, and insurers confidence in every report delivered.

The firm serves boat owners, buyers, and insurers throughout South Florida, including the waters and communities surrounding Miami, Fort Lauderdale, the Florida Keys, and beyond. From small recreational vessels to larger yachts and ships, Global Yacht & Ship Surveyors brings the kind of hands-on experience that only comes from nearly 30 years in the field. If you're navigating a boat purchase or need a survey for insurance purposes in the South Florida area, Robert Garay and his team are the surveyors locals have trusted since 1998.
content.seoTitle: Global Yacht & Ship Surveyors | Boat Surveying & Inspection Miami, FL
content.seoDescription: Need a marine survey in Miami or South Florida? Global Yacht & Ship Surveyors offers AMS®-certified boat inspections. Call today.

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: Global Yacht & Ship Surveyors conducts comprehensive marine surveys and vessel inspections covering hull condition, structural integrity, mechanical systems, electrical components, and safety equipment. Each survey is performed by Robert R. Garay, an AMS®-credentialed marine surveyor, and results in a detailed written report suitable for pre-purchase decisions, insurance underwriting, or financing requirements. Whether you're buying a vessel or maintaining coverage, a thorough professional survey helps you understand exactly what you're getting.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Based in Miami, FL, Global Yacht & Ship Surveyors serves boat owners and buyers throughout South Florida within a 75-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey for buyers evaluating a used vessel
Marine insurance survey for policy renewal or new coverage
Hull and structural inspection on fiberglass or wooden boats
Condition and valuation survey for financing or resale purposes
Safety equipment inspection ensuring vessels meet current standards
Full yacht survey covering mechanical, electrical, and deck systems
Damage assessment survey following a collision or weather event
